HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
David S. Zalob, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Peninsula Seafood of San Bruno, Inc., dba All Shores Seafood
Jocelyn Montuya, Thomas Montuya, Defendants appeared in Propria Persona

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted with modification. The claimof exemption is GRANTED exept for $65.00 per pay period.

MODIFICATION: $100.00 per pay period. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN

Off Calendar Jul-02-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Earnings Withholdings;
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCE:

David S. Zalob, Esq., for Peninsula Seafood Of San Bruno, Inc., Plaintiff/Moving Party

Plaintiff Penninsula Seafood of San Bruno, Inc.'s Motion for Earnings Withholding is granted. Plaintiff to provide further information concerning martial status of defendant and proposed garnishee Jocelyn Montuya. Order signed in open court. COMM. PAUL SLAVIT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2007 Continued To Jul-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar May-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
David Zalob, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Peninsula Seafood of San Bruno, Inc., dba All Shores Seafood.
Plaintiff's Witness: Kathleen Nagle, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Tomas Montuya as follows:
Damages $104,779.59
Prejudgment $14,637.00
Attorney Fees $2,825.00
Costs $ 513.50, for a total of $122,755.09
Judgment signed in open court.
